rows.description: Remote PDG equation node: \left(\frac{T_{\rm geostationary\ orbit}^2 G m_{\rm Earth}}{4 \pi^2}\right)^{1/3} = r_{\rm geostationary\ orbit}
Remote PDG equation node: v_{\rm satellite}^2 = G \frac{m_{\rm Earth}}{r}
Remote PDG equation node: \left(\frac{T_{\rm orbit}^2 G m_{\rm Earth}}{4 \pi^2}\right)^{1/3} = r
Remote PDG equation node: F_{\rm centripetal} = F_{\rm gravity}
Remote PDG equation node: v = \frac{2 \pi r}{T_{\rm orbit}}
Remote PDG equation node: G \frac{m_{\rm Earth}}{r} = \frac{4 \pi^2 r^2}{T_{\rm orbit}^2}
Remote PDG equation node: T_{\rm geostationary orbit} = 24\ {\rm hours}
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{m_{\rm satellite} v_{\rm satellite}^2}{r} = G \frac{m_{\rm Earth} m_{\rm satellite}}{r^2}
Remote PDG equation node: v = \frac{2 \pi r}{t}
Remote PDG equation node: F_{\rm centripetal} = \frac{m_{\rm satellite} v_{\rm satellite}^2}{r}
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{T_{\rm orbit}^2 G m_{\rm Earth}}{4 \pi^2} = r^3
Remote PDG equation node: F_{\rm gravity} = G \frac{m_{\rm Earth} m_{\rm satellite}}{r^2}
Remote PDG equation node: C = 2 \pi r
Remote PDG equation node: Newton's law of universal gravitation
Remote PDG equation node: T_{\rm orbit}^2 G m_{\rm Earth} = 4 \pi^2 r^3
Remote PDG equation node: v^2 = \frac{4 \pi^2 r^2}{T_{\rm orbit}^2}
Remote PDG equation node: Centripetal force
Remote PDG equation node: d = 2 \pi r
Remote PDG equation node: \theta_{\rm refracted} = 90^{\circ} - \theta_{\rm Brewster}
Remote PDG equation node: n_1 \sin( \theta_{\rm Brewster} ) = n_2 \sin( \theta_{\rm refracted} )
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{\sin( \theta_{\rm Brewster} )}{\cos( \theta_{\rm Brewster} )} = \frac{n_2}{n_1}
Remote PDG equation node: n_1 \sin( \theta_{\rm Brewster} ) = n_2 \cos( \theta_{\rm Brewster} )
Remote PDG equation node: \tan( \theta_{\rm Brewster} ) = \frac{ n_2 }{ n_1 }
Remote PDG equation node: \tan( \theta_{\rm Brewster} ) = \frac{ \sin( \theta_{\rm Brewster} )}{\cos( \theta_{\rm Brewster} )}
Remote PDG equation node: \tan( x ) = \frac{ \sin( x )}{\cos( x )}
Remote PDG equation node: Law of Refraction
Remote PDG equation node: \sin( 90^{\circ} - \theta_{\rm Brewster} ) = \cos( \theta_{\rm Brewster} )
Remote PDG equation node: n_1 \sin( \theta_{\rm Brewster} ) = n_2 \sin( 90^{\circ} - \theta_{\rm Brewster} )
Remote PDG equation node: \theta_{\rm Brewster} = \arctan{ \left( \frac{ n_1 }{ n_2 } \right) }
Remote PDG equation node: \sin( 90^{\circ} - x ) = \cos( x )
Remote PDG equation node: \theta_{\rm Brewster} + \theta_{\rm refracted} = 90^{\circ}
Remote PDG equation node: \sin( \theta_{\rm Brewster} ) = \frac{n_2}{n_1} \cos( \theta_{\rm Brewster} )
Remote PDG equation node: E_{\rm Rydberg} = \frac{ m_e e^4 }{ 32 \pi^2 \epsilon_0^2 \hbar^2}
Remote PDG equation node: v = \alpha c \sqrt{ \frac{m_e}{A m_p} }
Remote PDG equation node: E = \frac{ m_e e^4 }{ 32 \pi^2 \epsilon_0^2 \hbar^2}
Remote PDG equation node: E_{\rm Rydberg} = E
Remote PDG equation node: v = \sqrt{ \frac{K + (4/3) G}{\rho} }
Remote PDG equation node: m = A m_p
Remote PDG equation node: v = \alpha c \sqrt{ \frac{m_e}{2 m} }
Remote PDG equation node: v_u = \alpha c \sqrt{ \frac{m_e}{m_p} }
Remote PDG equation node: v = \sqrt{ \left( f\frac{E}{a^3} \right) \frac{1}{\rho} }
Remote PDG equation node: a^3 \rho = m
Remote PDG equation node: K = f \frac{E}{a^3}
Remote PDG equation node: v = \frac{e^2}{4 \pi \epsilon_0 \hbar} \sqrt{\frac{m_e}{2 m}}
Remote PDG equation node: [S_0] = \left(\frac{k_{\rm desorption}}{k_{\rm adsorption}} \frac{1}{p_A} + 1\right)[A_{\rm adsorption}]
Remote PDG equation node: k_{\rm adsorption} p_A [S] = k_{\rm desorption} [A_{\rm adsorption}]
Remote PDG equation node: k_{\rm adsorption} p_A [S] = r_{\rm desorption}
Remote PDG equation node: r_{\rm adsorption} = k_{\rm adsorption} p_A [S]
Remote PDG equation node: [S_0] = \frac{[A_{\rm adsorption}]}{\left( \frac{k_{\rm adsorption}}{k_{\rm desorption}} \right) p_A} + [A_{\rm adsorption}]
Remote PDG equation node: \theta_A = \frac{K_{\rm equilibrium}\ p_A}{1+K_{\rm equilibrium}\ p_A}
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{k_{\rm adsorption}}{k_{\rm desorption}} = \frac{[A_{\rm adsorption}]}{p_A [S]}
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{1}{K_{equilibrium}} = \frac{k_{\rm desorption}}{k_{\rm adsorption}}
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{[S_0]}{[A_{\rm adsorption}]} = \frac{1}{K_{\rm equilibrium}} \frac{1}{p_A} + 1
Remote PDG equation node: r_{\rm adsorption} = r_{\rm desorption}
Remote PDG equation node: r_{\rm desorption} = k_{\rm desorption} [A_{\rm adsorption}]
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{1}{\theta_A} = \frac{1+(K_{\rm equilibrium}\ p_A)}{K_{\rm equilibrium}\ p_A}
Remote PDG equation node: [S_0] = \left(\frac{1}{K_{\rm equilibrium}} \frac{1}{p_A} + 1\right)[A_{\rm adsorption}]
Remote PDG equation node: K_{equilibrium} = \frac{k_{\rm adsorption}}{k_{\rm desorption}}
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{1}{\theta_A} = \frac{1}{K_{\rm equilibrium} p_A} + 1
Remote PDG equation node: [S] = \frac{k_{\rm desorption} [A_{\rm adsorption}]}{k_{\rm adsorption} p_A}
Remote PDG equation node: F_{gravitational} = G \frac{m_1 m_2}{r^2}
Remote PDG equation node: T^2 = \frac{d_1+d_2}{d_1+d_2} d_2 4 \pi^2 \frac{r^2}{G m_1}
Remote PDG equation node: \frac{m_1 d_1}{d_2} = m_2
Remote PDG equation node: T^2 = \frac{r}{d_1+d_2} d_2 4 \pi^2 \frac{r^2}{G m_1}
Remote PDG equation node: F_{\rm centripetal} = m_2 d_2 \omega^2
Remote PDG equation node: m_2 d_2 \omega^2 = G \frac{m_1 m_2}{r^2}
Remote PDG equation node: F_{\rm centripetal} = m r \omega^2
Remote PDG equation node: m_1 d_1 = m_2 d_2
Remote PDG equation node: r = d_1 + d_2
Remote PDG equation node: F_{\rm centripetal} = G \frac{m_1 m_2}{r^2}
Remote PDG equation node: m_2 d_2 \frac{4 \pi^2}{T^2} = G \frac{m_1 m_2}{r^2}
Remote PDG equation node: T^2 = d_2 4 \pi^2 \frac{r^2}{G m_1}
Remote PDG equation node: d_2 \frac{4 \pi^2}{T^2} = G \frac{m_1}{r^2}
